name: Migration Full Implementation
description: Complete Odoo migration workflow: analyze source environment, assess compatibility, plan scripts, stage, execute, validate, and cutover.

steps.name: Analyze Source Environment
steps.description: Document source Odoo version, installed modules, customizations, and data volume

steps.name: Compatibility Assessment
steps.description: Identify breaking changes, removed APIs, and OpenUpgrade coverage for installed modules

steps.name: Plan Migration
steps.description: Create migration plan with backup, scripts, staging, validation, and rollback steps

steps.name: Develop Migration Scripts
steps.description: Write pre-migration, post-migration, and end-migration scripts for custom modules

steps.name: Staging Upgrade
steps.description: Run the upgrade in a staging copy of production and fix issues

steps.name: Validate and Cutover
steps.description: Validate data integrity, run smoke tests, reconcile balances, and execute production cutover
